meta.description: Interpretations of solar-return-to-natal aspects: a solar-return planet (the year's energy) aspecting a natal planet. Shows how the year touches the natal chart.
meta.ordering: Key 'p1-p2': p1 is the solar-return planet, p2 is the natal planet. Direction matters: 'mars-saturn' (solar-return Mars to natal Saturn) and 'saturn-mars' (solar-return Saturn to natal Mars) are different entries.

sun-sun.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Sun: the year's headline aspect — the Sun has returned to its natal spot (this is the solar return itself). A year of renewed vitality, a fresh start, and checking in with yourself: who am I, where am I headed. Strength: a surge of energy, clear goals, a new chapter; the risk, self-absorption and rushing decisions.
sun-sun.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Sun: a year of easy alignment with yourself. Vitality and goals are supported, with comfortable openings to shine without strain. Strength: confidence and harmony with your own plans; the risk, coasting and missed openings.
sun-sun.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Sun: a year of inner tension between who you've become and who you were. Circumstances challenge your will and push you to grow. Strength: tempered character and a rebuilt sense of purpose; the risk, conflict, stubbornness, and scattered energy.
sun-sun.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Sun: a harmonious year when vitality and plans flow easily. You're at peace with yourself, things move naturally, luck is on your side. Strength: ease, confidence, flow; the risk, complacency and untapped potential.
sun-sun.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Sun: a turning-point year of awareness through contrast — often the midpoint of an important cycle. Goals and identity are tested, frequently through other people. Strength: clarity and mature self-definition; the risk, conflict, polarization, and wavering.

sun-moon.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Moon: a year when vital energy turns toward feelings, home, and loved ones. Inner and outer self merge — you're drawn to family, comfort, and emotional wholeness. Strength: harmony of action and soul, warmth; the risk, mood swings and dependence on loved ones.
sun-moon.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Moon: a year of easy accord between doing and feeling. Home and emotions support your goals; it's easy to care for yourself and others. Strength: emotional comfort and balance; the risk, not using a warm opening for growth.
sun-moon.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Moon: a year of tension between goals and emotional needs, between work and home. Something pulls outward, something inward. Strength: growth by reconciling work and feeling; the risk, stress, family conflict, and unsettledness.
sun-moon.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Moon: a warm, harmonious year where goals and feelings are in tune. Home and emotions feed your drive; it's easy to be yourself and care for others. Strength: inner peace and support; the risk, slackness and passivity.
sun-moon.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Moon: a year of balancing outer work and inner life, often through family or a partner. Emotions and goals pull in opposite directions. Strength: awareness of your real needs; the risk, work-versus-home conflict and emotional swings.

sun-mercury.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Mercury: a year when attention and energy go into communication, study, and ideas. You think, talk, and assert yourself through words. Strength: clear thinking, visible ideas, useful contacts; the risk, overrating your opinions and nervous busyness.
sun-mercury.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Mercury: a year of easy openings through mind and word. Good for study, negotiation, and ideas — thought works in tune with your goals. Strength: clear self-expression and contacts; the risk, laziness about developing good ideas.
sun-mercury.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Mercury: a year where thoughts and plans rub against each other. Arguments, hasty words, and a gap between what you think and do are possible. Strength: a mind sharpened by challenges; the risk, misunderstanding, nervousness, and rushed decisions.
sun-mercury.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Mercury: a clear, mentally productive year. Thoughts, speech, and plans flow easily; study, negotiation, and writing go well. Strength: a sharp mind and persuasiveness; the risk, resting on ease and not digging deeper.
sun-mercury.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Mercury: a year of active dialogue and testing ideas through others. Arguments are possible, but so are key realizations. Strength: seeing your own thinking from outside; the risk, verbal conflict and clinging to being right.

sun-venus.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Venus: a year of love, pleasure, and creativity. Energy goes into relationships, beauty, and joy; you're attractive and drawn to the agreeable. Strength: charm, romance, harmony; the risk, laziness, self-indulgence, and spending energy on pleasure.
sun-venus.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Venus: an easy, pleasant year with openings in love and creativity. Affection, warm meetings, enjoyment of life. Strength: charm and harmonious bonds; the risk, missing pleasant chances through passivity.
sun-venus.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Venus: a year of friction in love, money, or values. Desires and duties rub; overspending or discord in relationships is possible. Strength: clarity about what you treasure; the risk, extravagance, discord, and self-indulgence.
sun-venus.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Venus: a harmonious, pleasant year for love, creativity, and enjoyment. Relationships and pleasures come easily; you're attractive. Strength: love, beauty, ease; the risk, laziness and too much comfort.
sun-venus.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Venus: a year when love and values come to the foreground through others. Attraction and compromise take center stage. Strength: balancing 'me' and 'we,' clarity in feeling; the risk, dependence on a partner and wavering desires.

sun-mars.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Mars: an energetic, combative year. Plenty of force, a drive to act, win, and push ahead — a great time for a bold move. Strength: drive, courage, achievement; the risk, temper, haste, conflict, and injury.
sun-mars.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Mars: a year of brisk energy and handy openings to act. There's force for your goals, and initiative pays off. Strength: productivity and healthy drive; the risk, not using the energy and stalling.
sun-mars.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Mars: a year of struggle and friction. There's plenty of energy, but it meets obstacles; conflict, haste, and overstrain are possible. Strength: achievement through effort and tempering; the risk, outbursts, quarrels, and rashness.
sun-mars.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Mars: an energetic yet smooth year. You have force and courage to spare, and action is effective without needless conflict. Strength: confident drive and achievement; the risk, taking easy energy for granted.
sun-mars.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Mars: a year when energy and will meet resistance, often through rivals or conflict. Strength: tempering and a fair fight; the risk, quarrels, rivalry, and provocations.

sun-jupiter.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Jupiter: one of the luckiest years. Growth, optimism, new opportunities, and good fortune; life expands. Strength: luck, confidence, development; the risk, overconfidence, excess, and overrating your powers.
sun-jupiter.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Jupiter: an easy, favorable year with openings for growth. Optimism, support, lucky chances — if you reach for them. Strength: luck and development; the risk, laziness and missed opportunities.
sun-jupiter.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Jupiter: a year of growth through overreach. You want more, but risk overrating your powers, overspending, and overpromising. Strength: ambition that drives development; the risk, overconfidence, excess, and carelessness.
sun-jupiter.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Jupiter: a happy, expanding year. Luck, growth, optimism, and support come easily. Strength: luck, confidence, new horizons; the risk, slackness and a taste for excess.
sun-jupiter.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Jupiter: a year of growth and opportunity, often through other people. Keep a sense of measure. Strength: development through partners and generosity; the risk, overreach, empty promises, and extravagance.

sun-saturn.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Saturn: a serious year of work, responsibility, and growing up. Energy goes into discipline, commitments, and long-term matters; it can feel heavy, but it's solid. Strength: maturity, a reliable result, endurance; the risk, fatigue, pessimism, and a sense of burden.
sun-saturn.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Saturn: a year of steady productivity. Discipline and effort give support; things get built reliably without strain. Strength: stability and earned progress; the risk, not using a working mood.
sun-saturn.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Saturn: a year of tests, limits, and hard work. Circumstances slow you down and demand responsibility and patience. Strength: tempering, discipline, a solid result through effort; the risk, gloom, overload, and fear of failure.
sun-saturn.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Saturn: a year of steady, earned progress. Discipline and maturity work for you without extra weight. Strength: reliability, endurance, durable achievements; the risk, excessive caution and stiffness.
sun-saturn.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Saturn: a year of being tested for strength, often through authorities, commitments, or external limits. Strength: maturity and stability through challenges; the risk, pressure, a sense of blockage, and clashes with 'the system.'

sun-uranus.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Uranus: a year of change, freedom, and surprises. Life refreshes in a leap; you crave independence and the new. Strength: breakthrough, originality, liberation; the risk, instability, impulsiveness, and abrupt reversals.
sun-uranus.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Uranus: a year of fresh openings and useful change. Openness to the new is rewarded; unexpected chances arrive. Strength: flexibility, originality, renewal; the risk, not seizing a chance to change.
sun-uranus.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Uranus: a year of sudden jolts and a pull toward freedom against the odds. Abrupt change, impatience, and disrupted plans are possible. Strength: liberation and breakthrough through tension; the risk, instability and impulsive decisions.
sun-uranus.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Uranus: a year of light, refreshing change and freedom. The new enters life without wreckage; it's easy to show originality. Strength: renewal, flexibility, inspiration; the risk, underrating the chance to change something.
sun-uranus.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Uranus: a year of change and awakening through outside events or people. Freedom and stability pull in opposite directions. Strength: liberation and a fresh view; the risk, sudden breaks and instability.

sun-neptune.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Neptune: a subtle, dreamy year when energy drains into creativity, the spiritual, and dreams. Less vigor, more sensitivity. Strength: inspiration, empathy, a creative lift; the risk, fog, fatigue, illusions, and lost clarity.
sun-neptune.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Neptune: a year of gentle inspiration and spiritual openings. Good for creativity, helping, and intuitive choices. Strength: imagination, sensitivity, fine intuition; the risk, dreaming instead of doing.
sun-neptune.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Neptune: a year of fog, doubt, and lowered energy. Illusions, disappointments, unclear goals, and energy leaks are possible. Strength: creativity and spiritual growth through a sober reckoning; the risk, deception, confusion, and a dip in energy.
sun-neptune.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Neptune: an inspired, gentle year with easy access to intuition and creativity. The spiritual and artistic flow naturally. Strength: inspiration, compassion, imagination; the risk, retreating into dreams and passivity.
sun-neptune.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Neptune: a year when ideals and illusions come to the foreground, often through others. It's easy to idealize and be disappointed. Strength: compassion and spiritual awareness; the risk, deception, illusions, and blurred boundaries.

sun-pluto.conjunction: Solar-return Sun conjunction natal Pluto: a year of deep transformation and growing personal power. Life moves through intense change, crisis, and rebirth. Strength: power, willpower, the capacity to be reborn; the risk, crises, control struggles, and obsession.
sun-pluto.sextile: Solar-return Sun sextile natal Pluto: a year of openings for deep, constructive change. You can consciously empower yourself and renew part of your life. Strength: willpower, influence, regeneration; the risk, leaving the potential for change untapped.
sun-pluto.square: Solar-return Sun square natal Pluto: a year of power tension and forced transformation. Crises, power struggles, and the pressure of circumstance are possible. Strength: deep rebirth through crisis; the risk, obsessiveness, control, and destructive conflict.
sun-pluto.trine: Solar-return Sun trine natal Pluto: a year of deep but organic change and growing influence. You're reborn without strain, gaining strength. Strength: willpower, depth, regeneration; the risk, underrating your own intensity.
sun-pluto.opposition: Solar-return Sun opposition natal Pluto: a year of power themes through others — control, intensity, charged confrontations. Strength: transformation through confrontation; the risk, power struggles, manipulation, and extremes.

moon-sun.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Sun: a year when feelings, home, and care warm your identity and goals. Emotion and will merge; you're drawn to family and inner comfort. Strength: inner wholeness and warmth; the risk, mood swings and dependence on loved ones.
moon-sun.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Sun: a year of easy accord between feelings and goals. The emotional backdrop supports your work; it's easy to be at peace with yourself. Strength: comfort and balance of soul and will; the risk, passivity and missed chances.
moon-sun.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Sun: a year of tension between feelings and goals, mood and will. Emotions get in the way of work, or the reverse. Strength: growth by reconciling heart and will; the risk, moodiness, stress, and wavering.
moon-sun.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Sun: a warm, harmonious year where feelings feed your drive. It's easy to care for yourself and pursue goals. Strength: inner peace and support; the risk, slackness.
moon-sun.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Sun: a year of balancing emotion and will, the personal and the shared, often through loved ones. Strength: awareness of your real needs; the risk, emotional swings and a clash of feeling and doing.

moon-moon.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Moon: a year of emotional renewal and return to yourself. Feelings, habits, and the need for care are foregrounded; you're drawn to home and family. Strength: contact with yourself, emotional wholeness; the risk, mood swings and getting stuck in feelings.
moon-moon.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Moon: an emotionally comfortable, gentle year. Your feelings are in accord with you; comfort and support come easily. Strength: emotional balance and warm bonds; the risk, comfortable passivity.
moon-moon.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Moon: a year of emotional tension and ups and downs. Old habits and new needs rub; restlessness and unsettledness are possible. Strength: growth in emotional maturity; the risk, moodiness, anxiety, and wavering.
moon-moon.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Moon: a warm, cozy year in tune with your own feelings. Emotions flow easily; home and loved ones give support. Strength: emotional harmony and care; the risk, overly cozy passivity.
moon-moon.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Moon: a year of emotional balance through others — loved ones, family, a partner. Moods swing between needs. Strength: awareness of your feelings; the risk, emotional swings and dependence on those around you.

moon-mercury.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Mercury: a year where thoughts and feelings are tightly interwoven. You're drawn to talk about personal matters, trust intuition, and connect heart-to-heart. Strength: sensitive, warm communication and an intuitive mind; the risk, subjectivity and anxious thinking.
moon-mercury.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Mercury: a year of easy accord between mind and feeling. It's easy to put emotions into words. Strength: emotional honesty in communication; the risk, superficiality without depth.
moon-mercury.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Mercury: a year where feeling and logic argue. Anxious thoughts, misunderstanding, and over-reading words are possible. Strength: learning to join head and heart; the risk, worry, hurt feelings, and indecision.
moon-mercury.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Mercury: a year of warm, clear communication and good intuition. It's easy to talk about feelings and understand others. Strength: emotionally intelligent communication and memory; the risk, resting on ease.
moon-mercury.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Mercury: a year of balancing feeling and reason, often through dialogue with others. Head and heart argue. Strength: balance and awareness; the risk, inner wavering and misunderstanding.

moon-venus.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Venus: a tender, warm year for love, comfort, and closeness. Feelings and affection merge; you're drawn to harmony and care. Strength: warmth, attachment, emotional harmony; the risk, indulgence and avoiding what's hard.
moon-venus.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Venus: a gentle, pleasant year with openings for warmth and love. It's easy to create comfort and warm bonds. Strength: tenderness and emotional comfort; the risk, letting the pleasant stay mere habit.
moon-venus.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Venus: a year of tension between the need for care and desires. Moodiness, discord in closeness, and emotional spending are possible. Strength: clarity about what the heart wants; the risk, hurt feelings, indulgence, and discord.
moon-venus.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Venus: a warm, harmonious year for love and comfort. Tenderness and care flow easily; relationships bloom. Strength: emotional and romantic harmony; the risk, laziness and a habit of comfort.
moon-venus.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Venus: a year when closeness and tenderness surface through others. A balance of give-and-take in love. Strength: warm bonds and awareness of needs; the risk, dependence and emotional swings in love.

moon-mars.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Mars: an emotionally charged, passionate year. Feelings push you to act, and reactions are quick and hot. Strength: energy, protecting loved ones, passion; the risk, temper, mood swings, and emotional conflict.
moon-mars.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Mars: a year of brisk emotions and healthy emotional energy. It's easy to act on the heart's prompting. Strength: warm drive and emotional courage; the risk, not using the impulse.
moon-mars.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Mars: an emotionally explosive year. Feelings and irritation slip easily into quarrels; home is tense. Strength: passionate energy for getting things done; the risk, outbursts, hurt feelings, and household conflict.
moon-mars.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Mars: a year where feelings and energy are in tune. You act from the heart; passion blends with warmth. Strength: confident, protective energy; the risk, taking harmony for granted.
moon-mars.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Mars: a year of emotional clashes, often through loved ones. Feeling and drive argue. Strength: honesty and dynamism in feeling; the risk, quarrels, irritability, and conflict at home.

moon-jupiter.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Jupiter: a warm, generous year of emotional abundance. Feelings expand; you're drawn to care, share, and rejoice. Strength: generosity, optimism, emotional comfort; the risk, overdoing it, indulgence, and emotional excess.
moon-jupiter.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Jupiter: a year of emotional warmth and optimism with pleasant openings. It's easy to feel support and generosity. Strength: optimism and emotional generosity; the risk, laziness and counting on things to work out.
moon-jupiter.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Jupiter: a year of emotional overreach. Feelings and expectations are inflated; excess, comfort-eating, and disappointments are possible. Strength: a big heart; the risk, indulgence, overdoing it, and mismatched scales of need.
moon-jupiter.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Jupiter: a warm, well-favored year. Emotional generosity, comfort, and optimism come easily. Strength: emotional abundance and support; the risk, indulgence and slackness.
moon-jupiter.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Jupiter: a year of emotional generosity through others, with a risk of overdoing it. Strength: warmth and big-heartedness; the risk, over-caretaking and mismatched senses of measure.

moon-saturn.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Saturn: an emotionally serious, restrained year. Feelings are muted; you're drawn to responsibility and solitude, and care takes effort. Strength: emotional maturity and reliability; the risk, coldness, sadness, and loneliness.
moon-saturn.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Saturn: a year of calm emotional stability. Feelings are under control; it's easy to be a steady support. Strength: reliability and emotional maturity; the risk, excessive restraint.
moon-saturn.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Saturn: a year of emotional heaviness and a shortage of warmth. Sadness, loneliness, and feeling misunderstood are possible. Strength: tempering and maturity through hardship; the risk, coldness, low spirits, and withdrawal.
moon-saturn.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Saturn: a year of calm, steady emotional ground. Feelings are mature and reliable; home and routine are stable. Strength: stability, loyalty, emotional endurance; the risk, restraint and dryness.
moon-saturn.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Saturn: a year where warmth and duty collide, often through loved ones or obligations. Strength: maturity of feeling through challenge; the risk, coldness, distance, and feeling unloved.

moon-uranus.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Uranus: a year of emotional jolts and shifts in feeling. Mood is changeable; you crave freedom and the new in your private life. Strength: liveliness, freshness, emotional honesty; the risk, instability and sharp swings.
moon-uranus.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Uranus: a year of emotional freshness and easy change. The new in feelings and daily life is invigorating. Strength: flexibility and openness; the risk, leaving the spark without depth.
moon-uranus.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Uranus: a year of emotional unpredictability. Sudden shifts in mood and circumstance throw you off. Strength: freeing yourself from the outworn; the risk, instability, anxiety, and abrupt shifts at home.
moon-uranus.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Uranus: a year of light, refreshing change in feelings and daily life. Freedom and novelty enter gently. Strength: liveliness, flexibility, renewal; the risk, mistaking freedom for coolness.
moon-uranus.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Uranus: a year of emotional change through others or sudden events. Closeness and freedom pull in opposite directions. Strength: an awakening of feeling; the risk, instability and distance.

moon-neptune.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Neptune: a subtle, dreamy, very sensitive year. Empathy is heightened; you're drawn to dreams, art, and compassion. Strength: intuition, tenderness, a creative feel; the risk, illusions, blurred boundaries, and emotional escape from reality.
moon-neptune.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Neptune: a year of gentle sensitivity and inspiration. Intuition and compassion help; it's good for creativity. Strength: empathy and imagination; the risk, drifting in the clouds instead of acting.
moon-neptune.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Neptune: a year of emotional fog and illusions. Disappointments, muddled feelings, energy leaks, and deceptive expectations are possible. Strength: compassion and subtlety through a sober reckoning; the risk, illusions, sadness, and lost boundaries.
moon-neptune.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Neptune: a tender, inspired year with easy intuition and compassion. Feelings are subtle; creativity flows. Strength: empathy, imagination, emotional softness; the risk, retreating into dreams.
moon-neptune.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Neptune: a year when ideals and illusions in feeling surface through others. It's easy to idealize and be disappointed. Strength: compassion and sensitivity; the risk, illusions, codependence, and blurred boundaries.

moon-pluto.conjunction: Solar-return Moon conjunction natal Pluto: a year of deep, intense feeling and emotional transformation. The hidden surfaces; attachments are transformed. Strength: depth, emotional power, rebirth; the risk, jealousy, control, and obsessive feelings.
moon-pluto.sextile: Solar-return Moon sextile natal Pluto: a year of openings for deep emotional work. You can consciously live through and renew your feelings. Strength: depth and emotional resilience; the risk, leaving the potential untapped.
moon-pluto.square: Solar-return Moon square natal Pluto: a year of emotional crises and power themes in feeling. Jealousy, storms, and obsessive states are possible. Strength: deep transformation through crisis; the risk, manipulation, jealousy, and emotional extremes.
moon-pluto.trine: Solar-return Moon trine natal Pluto: a year of deep but organic emotional change. Feelings are powerful but lead to renewal without strain. Strength: depth, resilience, regeneration of feeling; the risk, underrating the power of attachments.
moon-pluto.opposition: Solar-return Moon opposition natal Pluto: a year of intense feeling through others — closeness, power, control. Strength: transformation through deep bonds; the risk, jealousy, power games, and emotional extremes.

mercury-sun.conjunction: Solar-return Mercury conjunction natal Sun: a year when thinking and communication take center stage. You think, talk, and learn a lot; ideas feed your self-expression. Strength: mental clarity, visible ideas, useful contacts; the risk, overrating your opinions and nervous busyness.
mercury-sun.sextile: Solar-return Mercury sextile natal Sun: a year of easy openings through mind and word. Ideas align with your goals; study, negotiation, and contacts go well. Strength: clear self-expression; the risk, laziness about developing good ideas.
mercury-sun.square: Solar-return Mercury square natal Sun: a year where thoughts and will rub. Arguments, a gap between words and deeds, and rushed decisions are possible. Strength: a mind sharpened by challenges; the risk, misunderstanding, nervousness, and haste.
mercury-sun.trine: Solar-return Mercury trine natal Sun: a clear, mentally productive year. Thoughts and goals are in accord; it's easy to express yourself and persuade. Strength: a sharp mind and persuasiveness; the risk, resting on ease.
mercury-sun.opposition: Solar-return Mercury opposition natal Sun: a year of active dialogue and testing your views through others. Strength: seeing yourself from outside; the risk, arguments and clinging to being right.

mercury-moon.conjunction: Solar-return Mercury conjunction natal Moon: a year where thoughts and feelings are tightly interwoven. You're drawn to talk about personal matters, trust intuition, and connect heart-to-heart. Strength: sensitive, warm communication; the risk, subjectivity and anxious thinking.
mercury-moon.sextile: Solar-return Mercury sextile natal Moon: a year of easy accord between mind and feeling. It's easy to put emotions into words. Strength: emotional honesty in communication; the risk, superficiality.
mercury-moon.square: Solar-return Mercury square natal Moon: a year where logic and feeling argue. Anxious thoughts, misunderstanding, and over-reading words are possible. Strength: joining head and heart; the risk, worry and hurt feelings.
mercury-moon.trine: Solar-return Mercury trine natal Moon: a year of warm, clear communication and good intuition. It's easy to talk about feelings. Strength: emotionally intelligent communication and memory; the risk, resting on ease.
mercury-moon.opposition: Solar-return Mercury opposition natal Moon: a year of balancing reason and feeling, often through dialogue with loved ones. Strength: balance; the risk, inner wavering and misunderstanding.

mercury-mercury.conjunction: Solar-return Mercury conjunction natal Mercury: a year of renewed thinking and active communication. The mind is on the upswing — many ideas, contacts, study, and travel. Strength: clarity, quick learning, useful connections; the risk, busyness, scattered focus, and nervous tension.
mercury-mercury.sextile: Solar-return Mercury sextile natal Mercury: a year of easy mental openings. Thoughts flow; communication and study come easily. Strength: a lively mind and good contacts; the risk, superficiality.
mercury-mercury.square: Solar-return Mercury square natal Mercury: a year of mental tension and haste. Confusion, arguments, and errors in words or scheduling are possible. Strength: mental flexibility through challenges; the risk, misunderstanding, nervousness, and rushed conclusions.
mercury-mercury.trine: Solar-return Mercury trine natal Mercury: a clear, easy year for the mind. Study, negotiation, writing, and travel go smoothly. Strength: a sharp, flexible mind; the risk, skimming the surface without depth.
mercury-mercury.opposition: Solar-return Mercury opposition natal Mercury: a year of lively exchange and testing ideas through others. Strength: broadening views through dialogue; the risk, arguments and stubbornness.

mercury-venus.conjunction: Solar-return Mercury conjunction natal Venus: a year of charming, pleasant communication and warm conversations. Words ingratiate; good for creativity, flirting, and diplomacy. Strength: tact, charm in speech, accord; the risk, saying the pleasant instead of the honest.
mercury-venus.sextile: Solar-return Mercury sextile natal Venus: a year of easy, warm contacts and affection. Communication is pleasant; good for creativity and negotiation. Strength: charm and accord; the risk, superficiality.
mercury-venus.square: Solar-return Mercury square natal Venus: a year of friction between words and values. Disagreements over money, taste, or affection, and things left unsaid, are possible. Strength: clarity about what you treasure; the risk, smoothing over and misunderstanding.
mercury-venus.trine: Solar-return Mercury trine natal Venus: a year of charming, warm communication. It's easy to find accord and say the pleasant thing. Strength: tact, diplomacy, pleasant bonds; the risk, avoiding the uncomfortable truth.
mercury-venus.opposition: Solar-return Mercury opposition natal Venus: a year when values and tastes surface through dialogue with others. Strength: balancing mind and feeling; the risk, indecision and disputes over values.

mercury-mars.conjunction: Solar-return Mercury conjunction natal Mars: a year of a sharp, quick mind and heated talk. Thoughts are decisive, debate is constant. Strength: decisiveness, persuasiveness, initiative in affairs; the risk, sharpness, arguments, and hasty words.
mercury-mars.sextile: Solar-return Mercury sextile natal Mars: a year of energetic, productive thinking. It's easy to move from ideas to action. Strength: decisiveness and efficiency; the risk, not using the charge.
mercury-mars.square: Solar-return Mercury square natal Mars: a year of verbal clashes and mental haste. Arguments, sharp words, and rushed decisions are possible. Strength: a mind sharpened under pressure; the risk, quarrels, rudeness, and rashness.
mercury-mars.trine: Solar-return Mercury trine natal Mars: a year of decisive, energetic thinking, where ideas easily become action. Strength: a sharp, effective mind; the risk, taking ease for granted.
mercury-mars.opposition: Solar-return Mercury opposition natal Mars: a year of heated debate and testing ideas in argument with others. Strength: dynamic exchange; the risk, verbal battles and provocations.

neptune-sun.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Sun: a subtle, dreamy year when energy drains into creativity, the spiritual, and dreams. Less vigor, more sensitivity. Strength: inspiration, empathy, a creative lift; the risk, fog, fatigue, illusions, and lost clarity.
neptune-sun.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Sun: a year of gentle inspiration and spiritual openings. Good for creativity and intuitive choices. Strength: imagination, sensitivity, fine intuition; the risk, dreaming instead of doing.
neptune-sun.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Sun: a year of fog, doubt, and lowered energy. Illusions, disappointments, and unclear goals are possible. Strength: creativity and spiritual growth through a sober reckoning; the risk, deception, confusion, and a dip in energy.
neptune-sun.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Sun: an inspired, gentle year with easy access to intuition and creativity. Strength: inspiration, compassion, imagination; the risk, retreating into dreams and passivity.
neptune-sun.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Sun: a year when ideals and illusions come to the foreground, often through others. Strength: compassion and spiritual awareness; the risk, deception, illusions, and blurred boundaries.

neptune-moon.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Moon: a subtle, very sensitive year. Empathy is heightened; you're drawn to dreams, art, and compassion. Strength: intuition, tenderness, a creative feel; the risk, illusions, blurred boundaries, and emotional escape from reality.
neptune-moon.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Moon: a year of gentle sensitivity and inspiration. Intuition and compassion help; good for creativity. Strength: empathy and imagination; the risk, drifting in the clouds instead of acting.
neptune-moon.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Moon: a year of emotional fog and illusions. Disappointments, muddled feelings, and energy leaks are possible. Strength: compassion and subtlety through a sober reckoning; the risk, illusions, sadness, and lost boundaries.
neptune-moon.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Moon: a tender, inspired year with easy intuition and compassion. Strength: empathy, imagination, emotional softness; the risk, retreating into dreams.
neptune-moon.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Moon: a year when ideals and illusions in feeling surface through others. Strength: compassion and sensitivity; the risk, illusions, codependence, and blurred boundaries.

neptune-mercury.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Mercury: a year of imaginative, intuitive thinking. The mind is poetic and sensitive, but facts blur. Strength: imagination, intuition, creative ideas; the risk, confusion, misunderstanding, and self-deception.
neptune-mercury.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Mercury: a year of gentle mental inspiration. Intuition and imagery help; good for creativity. Strength: imagination and sensitivity; the risk, vagueness.
neptune-mercury.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Mercury: a year of mental fog and confusion. Misunderstanding, deception, and trouble separating fact from fantasy are possible. Strength: imagination through a sober reckoning; the risk, illusions and unclear words.
neptune-mercury.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Mercury: a year of intuitive, creative thinking. You sense the unspoken; ideas are poetic. Strength: imagination, empathy, inspiration; the risk, drifting from facts into dreams.
neptune-mercury.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Mercury: a year where logic and intuition argue, often through others. Strength: a visionary view; the risk, misunderstanding and self-deception.

neptune-venus.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Venus: an elevated, romantic year. Love is colored by dream, compassion, and ideal — but also illusion. Strength: tenderness, creativity, spiritual romance; the risk, idealization and disappointment.
neptune-venus.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Venus: a year of gentle romance and inspiration in love and creativity. Strength: compassion, tenderness, artistry; the risk, dreaming more than seeing.
neptune-venus.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Venus: a year of romantic illusions and disappointments. Deception, idealization, and self-sacrifice are possible. Strength: compassionate tenderness through a sober reckoning; the risk, deception and rescuing.
neptune-venus.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Venus: a tender, romantic, creative year. Love and beauty are spiritualized. Strength: tenderness, creativity, spiritual closeness; the risk, idealization and retreat from reality.
neptune-venus.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Venus: a year of romantic ideals and illusions through others. Strength: compassion and romance; the risk, idealization, deception, and codependence.

neptune-mars.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Mars: a year when energy blurs and flows by inspiration rather than force. Acting is harder but more creative. Strength: inspired, compassionate action; the risk, a dip in motivation, unclear goals, and energy leaks.
neptune-mars.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Mars: a year of gentle, inspired activity. Acting on intuition and creativity pays off. Strength: purposeful, sensitive energy; the risk, letting energy dissolve.
neptune-mars.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Mars: a year of unclear goals and lowered drive. Action going nowhere and deception are possible. Strength: inspired action when grounded; the risk, weak motivation and disappointments.
neptune-mars.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Mars: a year where action is spiritualized by creativity and intuition. Strength: artistic, purposeful, sensitive energy; the risk, drifting from concrete goals.
neptune-mars.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Mars: a year where drive and ideals argue, often through others. Strength: inspired, compassionate energy; the risk, confusion, action going nowhere, and deception.

neptune-jupiter.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Jupiter: a year of idealism, dreaming, and spiritual uplift. Faith and imagination expand. Strength: inspired faith, generosity, a shared dream; the risk, illusions and unrealistic idealism.
neptune-jupiter.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Jupiter: a year of gentle idealism and inspiration. Strength: spiritual warmth and imagination; the risk, dreaming more than doing.
neptune-jupiter.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Jupiter: a year of inflated dreams and detachment from reality. Illusions and escapism are possible. Strength: a dream grounded by sober reckoning; the risk, unrealistic hopes.
neptune-jupiter.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Jupiter: a year of inspired faith, compassion, and creative dreaming. Strength: idealism, generosity, spirituality; the risk, retreating into dreams.
neptune-jupiter.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Jupiter: a year of ideals and illusions through others. Strength: compassionate dreaming; the risk, illusions and disappointments.

neptune-saturn.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Saturn: a year where the dream meets structure — an attempt to ground ideals, or a quiet erosion of what's solid. Strength: practical idealism; the risk, doubt, disappointment, and undermining of foundations.
neptune-saturn.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Saturn: a year where imagination and discipline complement each other. Strength: a grounded dream; the risk, leaving the vision unmanifested.
neptune-saturn.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Saturn: a year of doubt and a clash between dream and duty. Disappointment and dissolving plans are possible. Strength: a dream earned through effort; the risk, gloom and swings of fantasy and cynicism.
neptune-saturn.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Saturn: a year where a dream takes shape through patience. Strength: practical idealism and disciplined creativity; the risk, the vision staying foggy without effort.
neptune-saturn.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Saturn: a year where ideal and reality argue, often through others. Strength: a dream tested by reality; the risk, doubt and swings of illusion and skepticism.

neptune-uranus.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Uranus: a year where dreaming meets innovation — visionary thinking, progress, and ideals intertwined. Strength: inspired innovation; the risk, unstable ideals and confusion.
neptune-uranus.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Uranus: a year where imagination and innovation complement each other. Strength: visionary creativity; the risk, vagueness.
neptune-uranus.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Uranus: a year of tension between ideals and sudden change. Strength: creative breakthroughs through friction; the risk, instability and disappointed ideals.
neptune-uranus.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Uranus: a year where dreaming and innovation are in tune. Strength: inspired innovation; the risk, influence stays foggy without focus.
neptune-uranus.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Uranus: a year where ideal and innovation argue, often through others. Strength: tension that gives birth to vision; the risk, instability and illusions.

neptune-neptune.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Neptune: a Neptune return is not possible in a human lifetime, so the conjunction occurs only in early childhood — a background of deep sensitivity forming around you. Strength: profound receptivity; the risk, shapelessness without personal focus.
neptune-neptune.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Neptune: a year of gentle spiritual and creative flow at a node of the Neptune cycle. Strength: inspiration and sensitivity; the risk, vagueness.
neptune-neptune.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Neptune: a year at a Neptune-cycle node (around ages 40–42) — a re-evaluation of ideals and dreams, possible disillusionment. Strength: spiritual maturing and a sober reckoning; the risk, a crisis of faith, illusions, and fog.
neptune-neptune.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Neptune: a year of harmonious spiritual and creative flow at a cycle node. Strength: inspiration, compassion, intuition; the risk, retreating into dreams.
neptune-neptune.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Neptune: the culmination of the Neptune cycle (in later life) — a re-evaluation of ideals through life and others. Strength: spiritual wisdom; the risk, disillusionment and illusions.

neptune-pluto.conjunction: Solar-return Neptune conjunction natal Pluto: a year of subtle, deep transformation of ideals and the inner world. A slow but powerful reshaping of values. Strength: deep spiritual renewal; the risk, shapelessness and passivity without personal focus.
neptune-pluto.sextile: Solar-return Neptune sextile natal Pluto: a year of gentle openings for deep spiritual and value-level renewal. Strength: deep creative-spiritual potential; the risk, influence stays diffuse.
neptune-pluto.square: Solar-return Neptune square natal Pluto: a year of subtle but charged re-evaluation of deep values and ideals. Strength: transformation of faith; the risk, vague crises and disorientation.
neptune-pluto.trine: Solar-return Neptune trine natal Pluto: a year of harmonious deep evolution of ideals and spirituality. Strength: regenerative vision; the risk, influence stays background without focus.
neptune-pluto.opposition: Solar-return Neptune opposition natal Pluto: a year of subtle opposition between deep force and ideals, often through large shifts. Strength: transformation of values; the risk, vague disorientation and illusions.

pluto-sun.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Sun: a year of deep transformation and growing personal power. Life moves through intense change, crisis, and rebirth. Strength: power, willpower, the capacity to be reborn; the risk, crises, control struggles, and obsession.
pluto-sun.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Sun: a year of openings for deep, constructive change. You can consciously empower yourself. Strength: willpower, influence, regeneration; the risk, leaving the potential untapped.
pluto-sun.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Sun: a year of power tension and forced transformation. Crises and power struggles are possible. Strength: deep rebirth through crisis; the risk, obsessiveness, control, and destructive conflict.
pluto-sun.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Sun: a year of deep but organic change and growing influence. Strength: willpower, depth, regeneration; the risk, underrating your own intensity.
pluto-sun.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Sun: a year of power themes through others — control, intensity, charged confrontations. Strength: transformation through confrontation; the risk, power struggles, manipulation, and extremes.

pluto-moon.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Moon: a year of deep, intense feeling and emotional transformation. The hidden surfaces; attachments are transformed. Strength: depth, emotional power, rebirth; the risk, jealousy, control, and obsessive feelings.
pluto-moon.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Moon: a year of openings for deep emotional work. Strength: depth and emotional resilience; the risk, leaving the potential untapped.
pluto-moon.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Moon: a year of emotional crises and power themes in feeling. Jealousy, storms, and obsessive states are possible. Strength: deep transformation through crisis; the risk, manipulation, jealousy, and emotional extremes.
pluto-moon.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Moon: a year of deep but organic emotional change. Strength: depth, resilience, regeneration of feeling; the risk, underrating the power of attachments.
pluto-moon.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Moon: a year of intense feeling through others — closeness, power, control. Strength: transformation through deep bonds; the risk, jealousy, power games, and emotional extremes.

pluto-mercury.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Mercury: a year of deep, penetrating thinking. The mind digs to the core; your words carry weight. Strength: insight, concentration, persuasiveness; the risk, obsessive thoughts, suspicion, and verbal manipulation.
pluto-mercury.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Mercury: a year of openings for a deep mind and investigation. Strength: insight and influence; the risk, leaving the depth untapped.
pluto-mercury.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Mercury: a year of obsessive thoughts and power-charged arguments. Pressure, suspicion, and manipulation with words are possible. Strength: insight through tension; the risk, fixations and verbal struggle.
pluto-mercury.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Mercury: a year of deep, focused thinking. It's easy to investigate, grasp the essence, and persuade. Strength: insight, concentration, influence; the risk, underrating the power of your words.
pluto-mercury.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Mercury: a year where depth and control over meaning surface through others. Strength: transforming exchange; the risk, verbal power games and suspicion.

pluto-venus.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Venus: a year of deep, passionate, transforming love. Attraction is powerful; feelings are intense; relationships change you. Strength: magnetism, depth, passion; the risk, jealousy, possessiveness, and control.
pluto-venus.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Venus: a year of openings for deep, honest intimacy. Strength: magnetism and depth; the risk, leaving the intensity untapped.
pluto-venus.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Venus: a year of obsessive attractions and power themes in love. Jealousy, possessiveness, and drama are possible. Strength: transforming passion; the risk, control, manipulation, and obsession.
pluto-venus.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Venus: a year of deep, passionate closeness that leads to renewal. Strength: magnetism, passion, transforming love; the risk, underrating the power of attachment.
pluto-venus.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Venus: a year of powerful attractions and struggles for control in love, through others. Strength: a deep, transforming bond; the risk, jealousy, possessiveness, and extremes.

pluto-mars.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Mars: a year of enormous willpower and intense energy. You act with power and can give everything to a transforming endeavor. Strength: iron will, endurance; the risk, power struggles, ruthlessness, and dangerous intensity.
pluto-mars.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Mars: a year of openings for powerful, transforming action. Strength: intense, effective willpower; the risk, leaving the power untapped.
pluto-mars.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Mars: a year of power tension and explosive energy. Control struggles and obsessive intensity are possible. Strength: the deepest willpower through crisis; the risk, ruthlessness, domination, and self-destruction.
pluto-mars.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Mars: a year of deep, focused willpower and endurance. Strength: powerful will, resilience, regeneration; the risk, underrating your own intensity.
pluto-mars.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Mars: a year of power struggle through others. Strength: transforming willpower through confrontation; the risk, power games, ruthlessness, and extremes.

pluto-jupiter.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Jupiter: a year of large-scale ambition and deep transformation. The pull toward great influence is powerful. Strength: powerful faith, willpower, the ability to reshape; the risk, obsession with power, fanaticism, and excess.
pluto-jupiter.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Jupiter: a year of openings for deep, large-scale change. Strength: focused ambition and influence; the risk, leaving the power untapped.
pluto-jupiter.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Jupiter: a year of hunger for control and fanatical ambition. Power struggles over growth are possible. Strength: large-scale achievement through tension; the risk, obsession and a drive to dominate.
pluto-jupiter.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Jupiter: a year of deep, powerful growth and influence. Strength: faith, regeneration, major success; the risk, underrating the pull toward power.
pluto-jupiter.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Jupiter: a year of growth and power through big stakes and others. Strength: transformation through major confrontations; the risk, power struggle and excess.

pluto-saturn.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Saturn: a year of heavy, deep transformation and structural overhaul through crisis. Strength: endurance, resilience, the power to rebuild; the risk, harshness, control, and a crushing weight.
pluto-saturn.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Saturn: a year where depth and discipline complement each other for sustained, deep work. Strength: dogged resilience; the risk, leaving the power unused.
pluto-saturn.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Saturn: a year of pressure, hard limits, and forced transformation. Strength: iron endurance through crisis; the risk, harshness, ruthlessness, and a sense of heavy blockage.
pluto-saturn.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Saturn: a year of persistent, disciplined transformation and rebuilding. Strength: endurance and the steady power of renewal; the risk, underrating your own relentlessness.
pluto-saturn.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Saturn: a year of power pressure and structural overhaul through outside forces. Strength: deep resilience under pressure; the risk, power struggle, harshness, and an exhausting conflict.

pluto-uranus.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Uranus: a year of radical change and deep transformation — a powerful breaking of the old and renewal. Strength: the force of renewal, breakthrough; the risk, extremism and chaotic change.
pluto-uranus.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Uranus: a year of openings for deep, constructive change and reform. Strength: large-scale, constructive renewal; the risk, loss of focus.
pluto-uranus.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Uranus: a year of upheaval and forced transformation. Abrupt breaks and crises are possible. Strength: revolutionary energy; the risk, extremism and destructiveness.
pluto-uranus.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Uranus: a year where transformation and change are in tune — deep renewal comes more easily. Strength: powerful, constructive change; the risk, the force staying impersonal without focus.
pluto-uranus.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Uranus: a year of confrontations — power and freedom on opposite poles, often through outside forces. Strength: transforming tension; the risk, extremism and destructive conflict.

pluto-neptune.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Neptune: a year of subtle, deep transformation of ideals and the spiritual world. A slow but powerful reshaping of values. Strength: deep spiritual renewal; the risk, shapelessness and passivity without personal focus.
pluto-neptune.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Neptune: a year of gentle openings for deep spiritual and value-level renewal. Strength: deep creative-spiritual potential; the risk, influence stays diffuse.
pluto-neptune.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Neptune: a year of subtle but charged re-evaluation of deep ideals and values. Strength: transformation of faith; the risk, vague crises and disorientation.
pluto-neptune.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Neptune: a year of harmonious deep evolution of spirituality and values. Strength: regenerative vision; the risk, influence stays background without focus.
pluto-neptune.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Neptune: a year of subtle opposition between deep force and ideals, often through large shifts. Strength: transformation of values; the risk, vague disorientation and illusions.

pluto-pluto.conjunction: Solar-return Pluto conjunction natal Pluto: a Pluto return is not possible in a human lifetime, so the conjunction occurs only in early childhood — a background generational theme of deep power forming around you. Strength: deep foundational potential; the risk, impersonal beyond personal focus.
pluto-pluto.sextile: Solar-return Pluto sextile natal Pluto: a year of gentle openings for deep renewal at a node of the Pluto cycle. Strength: potential for transformation; the risk, background, impersonal influence.
pluto-pluto.square: Solar-return Pluto square natal Pluto: a year at a Pluto-cycle node (in mature life) — a deep crisis of power, control, and rebirth. Strength: powerful transformation; the risk, crises, control struggles, and extremes.
pluto-pluto.trine: Solar-return Pluto trine natal Pluto: a year of harmonious deep evolution at a cycle node. Strength: potential for deep, constructive renewal; the risk, influence stays background without focus.
pluto-pluto.opposition: Solar-return Pluto opposition natal Pluto: the culmination of the Pluto cycle in later life — a major re-evaluation of power and control through life experience. Strength: deep wisdom of transformation; the risk, crises and power extremes.
